segments: : حدثنا سعد بن عبد الله، عن يعقوب بن يزيد، عن محمد ابن أبي عمير، عن بعض أصحابه، عن أبي عبد الله عليه السلام قال: الكلالة ما لم يكن والد ولا ولد.
arabic.text: : حدثنا سعد بن عبد الله، عن يعقوب بن يزيد، عن محمد ابن أبي عمير، عن بعض أصحابه، عن أبي عبد الله عليه السلام قال: الكلالة ما لم يكن والد ولا ولد.

segments: 1.	We were told by my father, may Allah grant him mercy, that he said: We were told by Sa’d bin Abdullah, from Ya’qoub bin Yazid, from Muhammed ibn Abi ‘Umayr, from some of his companions, from Abu Abdillah, peace be upon him, that he said: The kalala is when there is no parent nor child (to someone).
en.basel-kadem.text: 1.	We were told by my father, may Allah grant him mercy, that he said: We were told by Sa’d bin Abdullah, from Ya’qoub bin Yazid, from Muhammed ibn Abi ‘Umayr, from some of his companions, from Abu Abdillah, peace be upon him, that he said: The kalala is when there is no parent nor child (to someone).
